title: InspectDeploymentSpec
description:
Input for the ``inspect-deployment`` primitive: a read-only, throttled probe of a deployed experiment tree on the cluster.

Replaces raw ``ssh <host> "ls /scratch1/..."`` — which bypasses the #346 connection-storm hardening (ConnectTimeout / IdentitiesOnly / per-host safe_interval). The probe runs ``test -e`` + ``find -maxdepth N`` through the single throttled ``infra.remote.ssh_run`` seam: one connection per call, no caller-supplied command string, and the target path is confined strictly under the cluster's scratch root.

Exactly one of ``run_id`` / ``path`` selects the target.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Absolute path to the experiment directory (the one containing ``.hpc/``). Used to locate the journal when ``run_id`` is given. Defaults to the current working directory when omitted on the CLI.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Cluster key from ``clusters.yaml``. Resolves ``ssh_target`` (the throttled SSH destination) and ``scratch`` (the confinement root) for the probe.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Derive the probed path (``REPO_DIR``) from this run's journaled ``remote_path`` via the canonical ``deploy_target_for`` derivation. Mutually exclusive with ``path``.

path.title: Path
path.description: Explicit absolute path to probe. MUST resolve strictly under the cluster's scratch root, or the call returns ``spec_invalid``. Mutually exclusive with ``run_id``.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: ``find -maxdepth`` for the listing (1..4, default 1). Bounded so a single call cannot become a deep-traversal storm.
